steps.title: Convert minutes to hours
steps.content:
Average speed in miles per hour is distance divided by time in hours. Since $27$ minutes is $\frac{27}{60}$ hours, use
$$\frac{13}{27/60}$$

steps.title: Round the speed
steps.content:
Compute the speed and round to the nearest tenth.
$$\frac{13}{27/60}=\frac{13\cdot60}{27}=\frac{780}{27}$$
$$\frac{780}{27}=28.888\dots$$
The answer is 28.9.
